name: Super Arcade Boy in Defender of Planet Earth
short_description: A retro-style classic side-scrolling shoot ’em up. Fly Super Arcade Boy through 8 levels, blast enemy waves, grab power-ups, and take down bosses.
detailed_description:
A RETRO-STYLE CLASSIC SIDE-SCROLLING SHOOT ’EM UP!

Super Arcade Boy makes his debut as an arcade champion turned planetary freedom fighter.

Fly through 8 action-packed levels, blast waves of enemies, and take down bosses while grabbing power-ups to stay ahead of the chaos. Between battles, enjoy amusing dialogue as Super Arcade Boy trades lines with the very aliens he’s destined to defeat. Earth is under attack—lock in, power up, and finish the fight.

Features

  • 8 levels packed with boss battles

  • Waves of enemies to blast through

  • Power-ups to boost your run

  • Amusing dialogue between aliens and Super Arcade Boy

  • Retro-style classic side-scrolling shoot ’em up action

  • Fast, replayable arcade pacing

  • HD graphics

  • Gamepad support

Earth is under attack—power up and finish the fight!
